title: Delightful Mexican Stovetop Delight
description: A quick and flavorful Mexican-inspired dish made on the stovetop.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
When the butter is melted, add a pinch of salt to the skillet.
Cook for 1-2 minutes or until fragrant.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir occasionally until the desired consistency is reached.
Serve hot and garnish with additional salt if desired.
